mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_purchase_history (user_id, product_id, product_count, price, destination_id, status) SELECT #{userId}, c.product_id, c.product_count, p.price, #{destinationId}, 1 FROM mst_product p INNER JOIN tbl_cart c ON p.id = c.product_id WHERE #{userId} = c.user_id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tbl_purchase_history h INNER JOIN mst_product p ON p.id = h.product_id INNER JOIN mst_destination d ON d.id = h.destination_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.status = 1 ORDER BY h.purchased_at DESC;
